title: Humanoid robots get safer hands with tactile sensing
summary: A roundup of new tactile sensor designs enabling more reliable grasping in human environments.

title: Warehouse AMRs improve throughput using multi-agent planning
summary: Multi-agent coordination reduces congestion and improves pick/pack cycle times in dense facilities.

title: Underwater robots map reefs with low-power vision
summary: Researchers demonstrate an efficient onboard vision stack for long-duration reef surveys.
